title: Mobs Figures
description:
This pack will add you 21 mob figures.


Among them there are both harmful mobs and neutral ones.


To get them, rename the carved pumpkin
body:
**For correct work you need Optifine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

![This is an image](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2022/027/16296605-y_l.webp)

This pack will add you 17 mob figures
Among them there are both harmful mobs and neutral ones.

To get them, rename the carved pumpkin

**Name Figures:**
* Chainmail Skeleton
* Wither Skeleton
* Skeleton
* Stray
* Drowned
* Evoker
* Husk
* Zombie
* Zombie Villager
* Illusioner
* Piglin
* Piglin Brute
* Pillager
* Villager
* Wandering Trader
* Zombified Piglin
* Frostmaw
* Ferrous Wroughtnaut
* Vindicator
* Witch
